ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Harbor #212 so failed live screenshot capture does not mint screenshot refs or screenshot evidence.
non_goals: No provider launch internals beyond the screenshot failure evidence guard
No raw screenshot bytes, DOM, HAR, tokens, cookies, or network body storage
No hosted browser, marketplace, bulk collection, risk-control bypass, merge, or issue closeout before merge
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering Harbor #212 only and final main-controller closeout after merge.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Harbor runtime-api index/test files and HARBOR-212 item-specific Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Lode, WebEnvoy/Core, shared current pointer, provider launch internals outside the guard, and GitHub issue closeout before merge.
No real account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, production page, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, or external visible action.

forbidden_targets: provider launch internals outside the screenshot failure guard
ownership_constraints_detail.shared_carrier_policy: .loom/status/current.md remains no_active_item because this is an item-specific carrier PR.

delegations.task_goal: Patch live snapshot capture so screenshot capture failure does not mint screenshot refs/evidence.
non_goals: No PR body or GitHub writes
delegations.output_format: Summary with changed files, diff summary, validation results, risks, boundaries, and stale basis.
delegations.summary: Worker edited only packages/runtime-api/src/index.ts and packages/runtime-api/src/index.test.ts. Main controller read back the diff, installed worktree dependencies, reran validation, and integrated evidence into HARBOR-212 carriers.

delegation_evidence.integration_summary: Worker output was accepted after main-controller diff readback and validation. Worker did not write shared carriers or GitHub.

integration_evidence: `captureLiveSnapshot` now sets screenshot capture policy to deny when the session screenshot provider returns a structured error.
The failed screenshot path still produces page/source trace/refmap refs from readable page facts.
The failed screenshot path does not produce `screenshot_ref` or screenshot-type evidence.
Regression coverage is in `captures live page refs without screenshot evidence when screenshot capture fails`.

suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Harbor #212 evidence semantics only; App/Core/Lode runtime consumption and live production page evidence remain separate issues.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Re-run full suite checks if evidence refs, screenshot capture, session readability, PR head, or issue scope changes.

remaining_limitations: This PR fixes screenshot failure evidence semantics; it does not complete App packaged runtime supervision, Core real task execution, or Lode registry consumption.
No real account, browser profile, production page, or external visible action is used by this validation plan.
